news.title: Where tradition meets innovation at Ellis Library
news.summary_en: Mizzou’s Digital Media and Innovation Lab gives students hands-on access to cutting-edge tools, transforming a historic space into a hub for digital-age learning.

news.title: Wind in their ‘sales’: Trulaske students bring home honors in collegiate competitions
Sterilizing surgical implants with neutrons could reduce infections
news.summary_en: Mizzou researchers have created a new way to kill bacteria that gets trapped within surgical implants.

news.title: Idea Jam gives students opportunity to collaborate, pitch proposal to enhance campus life
news.summary_en: Winning team pitched plan for another convenient grab-and-go dining option.
